title: Global well-posedness, scattering and blow-up for the energy-critical,   focusing Hartree equation in the radial case
summary:
We establish global existence, scattering for radial solutions to the
energy-critical focusing Hartree equation with energy and $\dot{H}^1$ norm less
than those of the ground state in $\mathbb{R}\times \mathbb{R}^d$, $d\geq 5$.

title: Global well-posedness and scattering for the mass-critical Hartree   equation with radial data
summary:
We establish global well-posedness and scattering for solutions to the
mass-critical nonlinear Hartree equation $iu_t+\Delta u=\pm(|x|^{-2}*|u|^2)u$
for large spherically symmetric $L^2_x(\Bbb{R}^d)$ initial data; in the
focusing case we require, of course, that the mass is strictly less than that
of the ground state.
